provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Ministers (Assignment of Ministerial Functions) Notice, 2025.

provisions.title: Functions to be retained by President
provisions.content: The functions and responsibilities for the departments, business and other matters specified in the First Schedule to this Notice are retained by the President.

provisions.title: Functions of Minister
provisions.content: The Minister designated in the first column of the Second Schedule to this Notice shall have functions and responsibilities for the departments, businesses and other matters specified in the second column of the Second Schedule opposite to the entry designating such Minister.

provisions.title: Key result areas
provisions.content: For better and efficient performance of its functions, each Ministry shall— (a) identify key result areas and manage the performance of such key result areas; and (b) where necessary, collaborate with other ministries, departments, agencies and other public institutions.

provisions.title: Revocation of GN. No. 619B of 2023
provisions.content: The Ministers (Assignment of Ministerial Functions) Notice, 2023 is hereby revoked. First Schedule (Made under paragraph 2) First column Second column President Presidency (a) Cabinet Affairs (b) National Security Council Affairs; (c) Intelligence and Security Services; (d) Prevention and Combating of Corruption; (e) Monitoring of Public Leaders’ Ethics and Abuse of Powers; (f) Public Service Appeals; (g) Coordination of Good Governance and Public Sector Reforms; (h) e-Government; (i) Senior Leadership Development; (j) State Ceremonies; (k) Coordination of TASAF; (l) Presidential Communication; (m) Food and Agricultural Delivery Council Affairs; (n) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Office; and (o) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Office. Public Service Management and Good Governance: (a) Policies on Public Service Administration, Public Service Housing, Archives and Records Management, Public Service Pay and Incentives and Human Resource Management and their Implementation; (b) Administration of Public Service; (c) Performance Contracts; (d) Human Resources Development and Planning; (e) Payroll Management; (f) Public Service Ethics; (g) Management Services and Public Service Performance Improvement; (h) Establishment of Executive Agencies; (i) Public Service Remuneration and Welfare; (j) Retired State Leaders Services; (k) Public Service Reforms; (l) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Office; and (m) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Office. Planning and Investment: (a) Policies on Investment and their Implementation; (b) Promotion of Domestic and Foreign Investment; (c) Business Environment Improvement; (d) Private Sector Development (e) Planning Commission Affairs; (f) Investment and Special Economic Zones Affairs; (g) Public Investment Affairs; (h) Coordination and Development of Industrial Parks, Estates and Clusters; (i) Export Processing; (j) Export Promotion; (k) International Organisations Relating to Investment; (l) Follow-up of Poverty Alleviation Programmes in Various Sectors; (m) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Office; and (n) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Office. Youth Development: (a) Policies on Youth Development and their Implementation; (b) Coordination of Youth Development, Self-Reliance and Organisation; (c) Coordination of Civic Education for Youth, Youth Welfare and Protection, Youth Empowerment and Engagement; (d) Coordination of Youth Fora and Platforms; (e) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Office; and (f) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Office. Second Schedule (Made under paragraph 3) First column Second column Vice-President Union Affairs and Environment: (a) Cabinet Affairs; (b) Coordination of Union Matters; (c) Cooperation between the Government of the United Republic of Tanzania and the Revolutionary Government of Zanzibar for Non-Union Matters; (d) Climate Change Management; (e) Promotion of Cleaner Production and Green Economy; (f) Coordination of Blue Economy Affairs; (g) Environmental Protection and Enforcement; (h) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Office; and (i) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Office. Prime Minister Policy, Parliament, Coordination and Persons with Disabilities: (a) Policies on Disaster Management, HIV and AIDS, Illicit Drugs Control and Enforcement, Economic Empowerment and Persons with Disabilities and their Implementation; (b) Coordination of Government Policies and Business; (c) Protection of Rights and Welfare of Persons with Disabilities; (d) Coordination of Political Parties; (e) Leader of Government Business in the National Assembly; (f) National Festivals and Celebrations; (g) Disaster Preparedness and Coordination of Management of Civic Contingencies (Relief); (h) Coordination and Supervision of the activities of TACAIDS; (i) Facilitation and Implementation of Plans for Development of Dodoma as the Capital of Tanzania; (j) Coordination and Supervision of Transfer of the Government to Dodoma; (k) Economic Empowerment; (l) Tanzania National Business Council (TNBC) Affairs; (m) Government Press Services; (n) Facilitation of Electoral Process; (o) Illicit Drugs Control and Enforcement; (p) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Office; and (q) Extra–Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Office. Labour, Employment and Relations: (a) Policies on Labour, Labour Market, Social Security and Protection, Employment, Occupational Health and Safety, Relations and their Implementation; (b) Social Security and Protection; (c) Innovation and Productivity; (d) Protection of Fundamental Principles and Rights at Work; (e) Creation and Promotion of Productive and Decent Employment Opportunities for all; (f) International Labour Organisation (ILO) Affairs; (g) Trade Unions and Employers’ Associations; (h) Occupational Health and Safety Services; (i) Coordination of Relations Between the Government and Various Social Groups, including Political Stakeholders, Religious Institutions, Civil Societies and NGO’s; (j) Coordination of Government Engagement with Political Parties, Religious Institutions, Civil Societies and NGO’s; (k) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Office; and (l) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Office. Regional Administration and Local Government: (a) Policies on Decentralisation by Devolution (D by D), Regional Administration and Local Government Administration, Rural and Urban Development and their Implementation; (b) Regional Administration; (c) Local Government Administration; (d) Coordination of Rural and Urban Services such as Transport, Health, Water, Solid Waste Management and Sanitation; (e) Teachers Service Commission; (f) Small Scale Entrepreneurs and Traders Identification and Development; (g) Talents Identification and Early Development; (h) Primary and Secondary Education Administration; (i) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Office; and (j) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Office. Minister for Agriculture (a) Policies on Agriculture, Irrigation, Cooperatives, Food Security and their Implementation; (b) Food Security Management; (c) Crop Warehouse Licensing; (d) Strategic Food Reserve Management; (e) Development of Cooperative Societies and Cooperatives; (f) Cooperative Savings and Credit Societies; (g) Agricultural Infrastructure Development; (i) Plant Breeders Rights and Genetic Improvement; (j) Marketing and Value Addition for Agricultural Products; (k) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Ministry; and (l) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Ministry. Minister for Communication and Information Technology (a) Policies on Communication and Information Technology (ICT), Posts and Telecommunications and their Implementation; (b) Research, Development and Innovation in ICT; (c) ICT Professionals Development; (d) Establishment and Management of Postal Codes; (e) National ICT Broadband Backbone; (f) Safety and Security of ICT; (g) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Ministry; and (h) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Ministry. Minister for Community Development, Gender, Women and Special Groups (a) Policies on Community Development, Social Welfare, Gender, Women, Elderly, Children and other Related Special Groups and their Implementation; (b) Registration and Coordination of Non-Governmental Organisations (NGOs); (c) Women, Elderly, Children and Other Related Special Groups Development; (d) Parenting and Children Ethics; (e) Social Welfare and Community Development; (f) Promotion of Gender Equality; (g) Prevention of Gender Violence and Abuse; (h) Coordination of International Organisations under this Sector; (i) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Ministry; and (j) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Ministry. Minister for Constitutional and Legal Affairs (a) Policies on Legal Affairs and their Implementation; (b) Constitutional Affairs; (c) Administration and Delivery of Justice; (d) Legislative Drafting; (e) Public Prosecutions; (f) Civil Litigation and Arbitration; (g) Business Disputes Resolution, International Law and Contracts; (h) Human Rights and Legal Aid; (i) Insolvency and Trusteeship; (j) Law Reforms and Regulatory Impact Assessment; (k) Monitoring and Evaluation of implementation of Laws Related to Natural Wealth and Resources; (l) Extraditions and Extra Territorial Mutual Assistance in Criminal Matters; (m) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Ministry; and (n) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Ministry. Minister for Defence and National Service (a) Policies on National Defence and National Service and their Implementation; (b) National Service Training (JKT); (c) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Ministry; and (d) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programme and Projects under this Ministry. Minister for Education, Science and Technology (a) Policies on Education, Research, Library Services, Science, Technology, Innovation, Skills, Training Development and their Implementation; (b) Basic Education Development; (c) Teachers Training Accreditation and Professional Standards Development; (d) Technical, Vocational and Education Training; (e) Higher Education Development; (f) Talents Development; (g) Management of Folk Development Training; (h) Management of National Qualification Framework; (i) Skills Mapping and Development; (j) Schools Accreditation and Quality Assurance; (k) Education Press Services; (l) Promotion of Application of Science, Engineering, Technology and Mathematics; (m) Development of Local Expertise in Science, Technology and Innovation; (n) National Commission for UNESCO Affairs; (o) Research and Development in Science and Technology; (p) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Ministry; and (q) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Ministry. Minister for Energy (a) Policies on Energy, Oil and Gas and their Implementation; (b) Energy and Petroleum Resource Management; (c) Value Addition in Petroleum; (d) Oil and Gas Infrastructure Development; (e) Bulk Procurement of Oil; (f) Urban and Rural Electricity Services; (g) Local Content in Energy and Petroleum; (h) Renewable and Non-Renewable Sources of Energy; (i) Coordination of Clean Cooking Energy Affairs; (j) Energy and Water Utility Regulation; (k) Performance Improvement and Development of Human Resources under this Ministry; and (l) Extra-Ministerial Departments, Parastatal Organisations, Agencies, Programmes and Projects under this Ministry. Minister for Finance (a) Policies on Macroeconomic, Fiscal, Monetary, Financial, Public Procurement and Public-Private Partnership and their Implementation; (b) Formulation and Development of Government Budget Guidelines, Government Budget and its Implementation; (c) Management of Economy; (d) External Finance and Re
